name: Teriyaki Finger Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the steak and slice lengthwise into 1/2-inch strips.
2. Place the strips in a large glass bowl.
3. Combine all remaining ingredients in a separate container.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat and toss gently to coat.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 2-3 hours, allowing the flavors to marinate.
6. Drain the meat, discarding the marinade.
7. Loosely thread the meat strips onto skewers.
8. Grill over medium-hot coals, turning often, for 7-10 minutes or until the meat reaches the desired doneness.
9. Remove from skewers and serve.
YIELD: 6 servings
